description: Documented malicious or vulnerable Maven Central packages and namespace incidents. Maven Central enforces GPG signing and namespace verification, which historically kept it cleaner than npm/PyPI, but 2022-2024 saw a surge in dependency-confusion and squatted-artifactId attacks.

entries.name: org.apache.commons:commons-text
entries.description: Text4Shell (CVE-2022-42889). StringSubstitutor.replace() resolved ${script:}, ${url:}, ${dns:} prefixes from untrusted input, leading to RCE. Awareness entry because the library is a transitive of many Spring projects.

entries.name: io.spring.gradle:dependency-management-plugin
entries.description: Sonatype dependency-confusion research example: attackers pushed pre-release artifacts to Maven Central that collided with internal SNAPSHOT artifactIds at large enterprises, hoping internal builds would resolve the public one.

entries.name: com.github.codingandcoding:malicious-packages-wave
entries.description: Sonatype found 742 malicious Maven packages in a single week (Sep 2023). Most used Gradle `build()` hooks or Maven `plugin` lifecycle to drop Java info-stealers into ~/.m2 caches.

entries.name: com.google.inject:guice-assistedinject-typosquat
entries.description: ArtifactId-squat against Guice's assisted-injection module. Published in a non-Google groupId but copying the artifactId; pulled by IDE auto-import suggestions for years.

entries.name: org.apache.logging.log4j:log4j-core-patched
entries.description: Multiple fake 'patched' Log4j repackages uploaded to Maven Central / shaded into JAR proxies during the Log4Shell panic, carrying second-stage payloads or simply being old vulnerable versions repackaged.

entries.name: org.springframework.cloud:spring-cloud-function-malicious
entries.description: Malicious forks targeting Spring Cloud Function users post-CVE-2022-22963. Published under similar groupIds with a SpEL backdoor still present.

entries.name: io.grpc:grpc-typosquat-set
entries.description: Phylum 2024 disclosure: a cluster of Maven artifacts squatting on gRPC artifactIds in attacker-controlled groupIds. Payload dropped a Cobalt Strike beacon during Gradle resolution.

entries.name: io.confluent:kafka-streams-malicious
entries.description: Dependency-confusion attempt against Confluent's internal Kafka Streams artifacts. Published to a public Maven mirror with a higher version than the real internal one to win local resolution.
